name: Tonight
detailedForecast: Patchy fog and a slight chance of showers and thunderstorms between 9pm and 11pm, then patchy fog and a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 11pm and 2am, then patchy fog and a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 2am and 5am, then patchy fog and a slight chance of rain showers. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 63. South wind 3 to 12 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
